title: Door Design Lab configurator scraper input

startUrls.title: Product URLs
startUrls.description: List of doordesignlab.com product page URLs to scrape (e.g. https://doordesignlab.com/optima-4h-pecan-nutwood.html). This is the main input.

productIds.title: Product IDs (optional)
productIds.description: Alternative to URLs: Magento product ids (the data-id of #configuratorProductId). Each is fetched via /configurator/ajax/start/?product_id=ID. Use only if you don't have URLs.

harvestMode.title: Option harvesting
harvestMode.description: How much of the DYNAMIC option catalog to load. The start config only ships slab/config options; frame, hinges, handles, locksets, locks, pre-hanging etc. are loaded by replaying /configurator/ajax/. 'path' = one default walk (~10-15 requests). 'branches' = diverge at choice steps to collect common alternates (fast, partial). 'full' = coverage-driven exploration of every STRUCTURAL branch, chasing ~100% step coverage (slow — hundreds of requests/minutes per product; best-effort, may not hit 100% on the biggest templates within budget). 'none' = tree only. NOTE: option catalogs are shared across all products of a TEMPLATE (what-config / metal-frame / …) — run 'full' once per template, not per product.

maxBranchWalks.title: Max branch/full walks
maxBranchWalks.description: Upper bound on divergent walks per product (each ≈ 10-15 requests). For 'branches' ~14 is plenty; for 'full' set high (200-500) and give it a large walkTimeoutSecs to approach complete coverage.

branchCap.title: Branch cap (full mode)
branchCap.description: Only for harvestMode = 'full'. Diverge only on decision steps with at most this many options (structural branchers: type/direction/yes-no/function). Bigger product lists are captured once, not branched. Raise only if a large list is known to branch.

walkTimeoutSecs.title: Harvest time budget (s)
walkTimeoutSecs.description: Per-product wall-clock budget for all configurator POSTs. Harvesting stops when exceeded and returns whatever was collected.

expandDoorTypes.title: Auto-discover door types
expandDoorTypes.description: Each door TYPE (Swing, Frameless, Double Swing, Only Slab, Pocket, Double Pocket, Barn, Bypass, Bi-Fold, Hidden barn) is a SEPARATE product URL with its OWN steps. When on, the actor reads the config_first step of each product and enqueues all sibling door-type URLs, so one input URL per model yields every door type. Multiplies work ~10× per model — deduped by URL.

buildBom.title: Build default BOM
buildBom.description: Assemble the finished bill of materials (slab + frame/jamb/header/hinges + handle + lockset + …) with a total price from the default walk. The full configurator tree is always extracted regardless.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: How many products to process in parallel. Keep moderate (5–10) to stay under Cloudflare's radar.

maxRequestRetries.title: Max retries per product
maxRequestRetries.description: Retries when Cloudflare blocks the request or the configurator fails to load. A new proxy IP / browser session is used on each retry.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. RESIDENTIAL Apify proxy is strongly recommended — Cloudflare's managed challenge blocks datacenter IPs.
